jobs.title: Security & Network Engineer
jobs.description:
Tinext Cloud empowers businesses in the seamless implementation and operation of IT systems in Cloud. Our team of qualified professionals leverages cutting-edge technologies to deliver comprehensive IT services, from Design and Organization to Management and Support. With an integrated ecosystem, we promptly address the evolving needs of clients, maximizing the benefits of Cloud services.For our fast-growing organizational structure, we are currently looking for a:
SECURITY & NETWORK ENGINEER
Does technology inspire you? Are you passionate about cybersecurity and network protection? Then come and build with us, supporting our strong qualitative and quantitative growth.
The ideal candidate has strong expertise in IT security, with a particular focus on Fortinet technologies, and is eager to take ownership of security architecture, governance, and continuous improvement initiatives.The position will report to the Head of Operations within Tinext Cloud and will be based in our HQ in Morbio Inferiore.
In this role, you will be in charge of the following activities:
You will take ownership of the design, implementation, and management of network security solutions based on Fortinet technologies.
You will define, maintain, and continuously improve policies, configuration standards, templates, and SOPs, ensuring alignment with best practices and security requirements for both internal infrastructure and clients.
• You will manage and optimize Security ecosystem components, including FortiManager and FortiAnalyzer, ensuring proper configuration, centralized management, and log governance.
• You will oversee security operations such as deep packet inspection, vulnerability mitigation, firmware updates, and the implementation of advanced features (e.g., ZTNA, SOC-as-a-Service).
• You will contribute to the evolution of security services by testing and introducing new functionalities and solutions, strengthening the overall security posture.
You will support and coordinate firewall-related activities during project design and startup phases, relieving the delivery team from daily security operations and allowing them to focus on systems and cloud environments.
• You will collaborate with internal teams (e.g., TAMs, system engineers) and external stakeholders, ensuring adherence to defined standards and supporting large-scale implementations when needed.
• You will manage and improve SOC interfaces, reporting, and security notifications, as well as produce client-facing security reports.
• You will contribute to client migrations (e.g., IPsec/mobile VPN transitions) and ensure consistent and secure configurations across environments.
• You will also collaborate with system specialists on endpoint security solutions such as FortiClient, FortiEDR, and FortiAuthenticator.

Your Identikit:
• At least 5+ years of professional experience in network and security engineering, with a strong focus on firewall management and network security.
• Solid experience with Fortinet technologies (FortiGate, FortiManager, FortiAnalyzer), including multi-client environments.
• Strong knowledge of network fundamentals and security best practices.
• Experience in defining and managing firewall policies, templates, and security standards.
• Good knowledge of Windows and Linux operating systems, particularly in relation to endpoint security solutions.
• Experience with FortiWeb and broader Fortinet ecosystem solutions is considered a strong plus.
• Certifications such as Fortinet NSE4 (or higher, ideally NSE7 – Enterprise Firewall) are highly desirable.
• Analytical mindset, precision, and a structured approach to problem-solving.
• Passion for cybersecurity, continuous improvement, and emerging technologies.
• A team player with strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate across technical domains.
• Fluent in Italian and English, German would be a plus.
• You live in Switzerland or close to the Italian-Swiss border, or you are willing to relocate.

What you can expect:
• Competitive salary package
• Career path and growth opportunities within the security domain
• Hybrid working conditions (smart working)
• International and dynamic environment
• Continuous learning and certification support
• 60% employer’s contribution on LPP
• Transport reimbursement or free car parking

descriptionByLocale.it: Tinext Cloud consente alle aziende di implementare e gestire senza soluzione di continuità i sistemi IT in Cloud. Il nostro team di professionisti qualificati sfrutta tecnologie all'avanguardia per fornire servizi IT completi, dal Design e Organizzazione alla Gestione e supporto. Con un ecosistema integrato, affrontiamo prontamente le esigenze in evoluzione dei clienti, massimizzando i vantaggi dei servizi Cloud. Per la nostra struttura organizzativa in rapida crescita, stiamo attualmente cercando un: La tecnologia ti ispira? Sei appassionato di sicurezza informatica e protezione della rete? Poi vieni a costruire con noi, sostenendo la nostra forte crescita qualitativa e quantitativa. Il candidato ideale ha una forte esperienza nella sicurezza informatica, con un particolare focus sulle tecnologie Fortinet, ed è impaziente di prendere possesso di architettura di sicurezza, governance e iniziative di miglioramento continuo. La posizione sarà riferita al Capo delle Operazioni all'interno di Tinext Cloud e sarà basata nel nostro quartier generale a Morbio Inferiore. In questo ruolo, sarete responsabili delle seguenti attività: - Prenderete la proprietà della progettazione, implementazione e gestione di soluzioni di sicurezza di rete basate sulle tecnologie Fortinet. - No. Definirete, manterrete e migliorare continuamente le politiche, gli standard di configurazione, i modelli e le SOP, garantendo l'allineamento con le migliori pratiche e requisiti di sicurezza sia per le infrastrutture interne che per i clienti. - No. Potrai gestire e ottimizzare i componenti dell'ecosistema di sicurezza, tra cui FortiManager e FortiAnalyzer, garantendo una corretta configurazione, gestione centralizzata e governance dei log. - No. Potrai supervisionare le operazioni di sicurezza come l'ispezione dei pacchetti profondi, la mitigazione delle vulnerabilità, gli aggiornamenti del firmware e l'implementazione di funzionalità avanzate (ad esempio, ZTNA, SOC-as-a-Service). Contribuirai all'evoluzione dei servizi di sicurezza testando e introducendo nuove funzionalità e soluzioni, rafforzando la postura generale di sicurezza. - No. Potrai supportare e coordinare le attività legate al firewall durante le fasi di progettazione e avvio del progetto, rivivendo il team di consegna dalle operazioni di sicurezza quotidiane e permettendo loro di concentrarsi su sistemi e ambienti cloud. - No. Potrai collaborare con team interni (ad esempio, TAM, ingegneri di sistema) e stakeholder esterni, assicurando l'adesione a standard definiti e supportando implementazioni su larga scala quando necessario. - No. Potrai gestire e migliorare le interfacce SOC, la segnalazione e le notifiche di sicurezza, nonché produrre report di sicurezza rivolti ai clienti. - Contribuirai alle migrazioni client (ad esempio, transizioni IPsec/mobile VPN) e garantirai configurazioni costanti e sicure in tutti gli ambienti. - No. Collaborerai anche con specialisti di sistema su soluzioni di sicurezza endpoint come FortiClient, FortiEDR e FortiAuthenticator. ## Identikit - Almeno 5+ anni di esperienza professionale nell'ingegneria della rete e della sicurezza, con una forte attenzione alla gestione del firewall e alla sicurezza della rete. - Esperienza solida con le tecnologie Fortinet (FortiGate, FortiManager, FortiAnalyzer), compresi gli ambienti multi-client. - Forte conoscenza dei fondamenti di rete e delle best practice di sicurezza. - Esperienza nella definizione e nella gestione delle politiche del firewall, dei modelli e degli standard di sicurezza. - Buona conoscenza dei sistemi operativi Windows e Linux, in particolare in relazione alle soluzioni di sicurezza endpoint. - L'esperienza con le soluzioni di ecosistema FortiWeb e Fortinet più ampie è considerata un vantaggio forte. - Certificazioni come Fortinet NSE4 (o superiore, idealmente NSE7 – Enterprise Firewall) sono altamente auspicabili. - Mindset analitico, precisione e un approccio strutturato alla risoluzione dei problemi. - Passione per la sicurezza informatica, il miglioramento continuo e le tecnologie emergenti. - Un giocatore di squadra con forti capacità di comunicazione e la capacità di collaborare attraverso domini tecnici. - Fluente in italiano e inglese, il tedesco sarebbe un vantaggio. - No. Vivi in Svizzera o vicino al confine tra Italia e Svizzera, o sei disposto a trasferirti. # Cosa# offrono - Pacchetto di stipendio competitivo - Opportunità di carriera e crescita all'interno del dominio di sicurezza - Condizioni di lavoro ibride (lavoro intelligente) - Ambiente internazionale e dinamico - Supporto continuo di apprendimento e certificazione - Contributo del datore di lavoro 60% su LPP - Rimborso di trasporto o parcheggio auto gratuito
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione Tinext Cloud empowers businesses in the seamless implementation and operation of IT systems in Cloud. Our team of qualified professionals leverages cutting-edge technologies to deliver comprehensive IT services, from Design and Organization to Management and Support. With an integrated ecosystem, we promptly address the evolving needs of clients, maximizing the benefits of Cloud services. For our fast-growing organizational structure, we are currently looking for a: SECURITY & NETWORK ENGINEER Does technology inspire you? Are you passionate about cybersecurity and network protection? Then come and build with us, supporting our strong qualitative and quantitative growth. The ideal candidate has strong expertise in IT security, with a particular focus on Fortinet technologies, and is eager to take ownership of security architecture, governance, and continuous improvement initiatives. The position will report to the Head of Operations within Tinext Cloud and will be based in our HQ in Morbio Inferiore. In this role, you will be in charge of the following activities: - You will take ownership of the design, implementation, and management of network security solutions based on Fortinet technologies. - You will define, maintain, and continuously improve policies, configuration standards, templates, and SOPs, ensuring alignment with best practices and security requirements for both internal infrastructure and clients. - You will manage and optimize Security ecosystem components, including FortiManager and FortiAnalyzer, ensuring proper configuration, centralized management, and log governance. - You will oversee security operations such as deep packet inspection, vulnerability mitigation, firmware updates, and the implementation of advanced features (e.g., ZTNA, SOC-as-a-Service). - You will contribute to the evolution of security services by testing and introducing new functionalities and solutions, strengthening the overall security posture. - You will support and coordinate firewall-related activities during project design and startup phases, relieving the delivery team from daily security operations and allowing them to focus on systems and cloud environments. - You will collaborate with internal teams (e.g., TAMs, system engineers) and external stakeholders, ensuring adherence to defined standards and supporting large-scale implementations when needed. - You will manage and improve SOC interfaces, reporting, and security notifications, as well as produce client-facing security reports. - You will contribute to client migrations (e.g., IPsec/mobile VPN transitions) and ensure consistent and secure configurations across environments. - You will also collaborate with system specialists on endpoint security solutions such as FortiClient, FortiEDR, and FortiAuthenticator. ## Identikit - At least 5+ years of professional experience in network and security engineering, with a strong focus on firewall management and network security. - Solid experience with Fortinet technologies (FortiGate, FortiManager, FortiAnalyzer), including multi-client environments. - Strong knowledge of network fundamentals and security best practices. - Experience in defining and managing firewall policies, templates, and security standards. - Good knowledge of Windows and Linux operating systems, particularly in relation to endpoint security solutions. - Experience with FortiWeb and broader Fortinet ecosystem solutions is considered a strong plus. - Certifications such as Fortinet NSE4 (or higher, ideally NSE7 – Enterprise Firewall) are highly desirable. - Analytical mindset, precision, and a structured approach to problem-solving. - Passion for cybersecurity, continuous improvement, and emerging technologies. - A team player with strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate across technical domains. - Fluent in Italian and English, German would be a plus. - You live in Switzerland or close to the Italian-Swiss border, or you are willing to relocate. ##
• Cosa offriamo - Competitive salary package - Career path and growth opportunities within the security domain - Hybrid working conditions (smart working) - International and dynamic environment - Continuous learning and certification support - 60% employer’s contribution on LPP - Transport reimbursement or free car parking
descriptionByLocale.de:
Tinext Cloud ermöglicht Unternehmen bei der nahtlosen Implementierung und dem Betrieb von IT-Systemen in Cloud. Unser Team von qualifizierten Fachleuten nutzt modernste Technologien, um umfassende IT-Dienste zu bieten, von Design und Organisation bis hin zu Management und Support. Mit einem integrierten Ökosystem beschäftigen wir uns umgehend mit den wachsenden Bedürfnissen der Kunden und maximieren die Vorteile von Cloud-Services. Für unsere schnell wachsende Organisationsstruktur suchen wir aktuell nach: SECURITY & NETWORK ENGINEER inspiriert dich die Technologie? Sind Sie leidenschaftlich über Cybersicherheit und Netzwerkschutz? Dann kommen Sie und bauen mit uns zusammen und unterstützen unser starkes qualitatives und quantitatives Wachstum. Der ideale Kandidat verfügt über ein starkes Know-how in der IT-Sicherheit, mit einem besonderen Fokus auf Fortinet-Technologien und ist bestrebt, sich an Sicherheitsarchitektur, Governance und kontinuierliche Verbesserungsinitiativen zu beteiligen. Die Position wird dem Head of Operations innerhalb der Tinext Cloud berichten und wird in unserem HQ in Morbio Inferiore basieren. In dieser Rolle übernehmen Sie die folgenden Aktivitäten: - Sie übernehmen das Eigentum an Design, Implementierung und Management von Netzwerksicherheitslösungen auf Basis von Fortinet-Technologien. - Ja. Sie definieren, pflegen und kontinuierlich verbessern Richtlinien, Konfigurationsstandards, Vorlagen und SOPs, um die Einhaltung der besten Praktiken und Sicherheitsanforderungen für interne Infrastruktur und Kunden zu gewährleisten. - Ja. Sie verwalten und optimieren Sicherheits-Ökosystem-Komponenten, einschließlich FortiManager und FortiAnalyzer, um eine ordnungsgemäße Konfiguration, zentrale Verwaltung und Log Governance zu gewährleisten. - Ja. Sie werden Sicherheitsoperationen wie tiefe Paketinspektion, Sicherheitsminderung, Firmware-Updates und die Implementierung fortschrittlicher Funktionen (z.B. ZTNA, SOC-as-a-Service) überwachen. Sie werden zur Entwicklung von Sicherheitsdiensten beitragen, indem Sie neue Funktionalitäten und Lösungen testen und einführen und die Gesamtsicherheit stärken. - Ja. Sie unterstützen und koordinieren Firewall-bezogene Aktivitäten während der Projekt- und Startphase, entlasten das Lieferteam von täglichen Sicherheitsoperationen und ermöglichen es ihnen, sich auf Systeme und Cloud-Umgebungen zu konzentrieren. - Ja. Sie werden mit internen Teams (z.B. TAMs, Systemingenieuren) und externen Stakeholdern zusammenarbeiten, um die Einhaltung definierter Standards zu gewährleisten und bei Bedarf umfangreiche Implementierungen zu unterstützen. - Ja. Sie verwalten und verbessern SOC-Schnittstellen, Berichterstattungs- und Sicherheitsmeldungen sowie kundenorientierte Sicherheitsberichte. - Sie werden zu Client-Migrationen (z.B. IPsec/mobile VPN-Übergänge) beitragen und konsistente und sichere Konfigurationen in Umgebungen gewährleisten. - Ja. Sie werden auch mit Systemspezialisten an Endpoint-Sicherheitslösungen wie FortiClient, FortiEDR und FortiAuthenticator zusammenarbeiten. Identikit - Mindestens 5+ Jahre Berufserfahrung im Netzwerk- und Sicherheitstechnik, mit einem starken Fokus auf Firewall-Management und Netzwerksicherheit. - Solide Erfahrung mit Fortint-Technologien (FortiGate, FortiManager, FortiAnalyzer), einschließlich multi-client Umgebungen. - Starkes Wissen über Netzwerk-Grundlagen und Sicherheitsbest Practices. - Erfahrung in der Definition und Verwaltung von Firewall-Richtlinien, Vorlagen und Sicherheitsstandards. - Gute Kenntnisse über Windows- und Linux-Betriebssysteme, insbesondere in Bezug auf Endpoint-Sicherheitslösungen. - Erfahrung mit FortiWeb und breiteren Fortinet-Ökosystemlösungen gilt als ein starkes Plus. - Zertifizierungen wie Fortinet NSE4 (oder höher, idealerweise NSE7 – Enterprise Firewall) sind sehr wünschenswert. - Analytische Denkweise, Präzision und ein strukturierter Ansatz zur Problemlösung. - Leidenschaft für Cybersicherheit, kontinuierliche Verbesserung und aufstrebende Technologien. - Ein Teamplayer mit starken Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und der Fähigkeit, über technische Domänen zusammenzuarbeiten. - Fluent auf Italienisch und Englisch, Deutsch wäre ein Plus. - Ja. Sie leben in der Schweiz oder in der Nähe der italienischen Grenze, oder Sie sind bereit, zu verlagern.
• Cosa offriamo - Competitive Gehaltspaket - Karrierewege und Wachstumschancen innerhalb des Sicherheitsbereichs - Hybride Arbeitsbedingungen (smart working) - Internationales und dynamisches Umfeld - Kontinuierliches Lernen und Zertifizierungsunterstützung - 60% Arbeitgeberbeitrag auf LPP - Transporterstattung oder kostenlose Parkplätze
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione Tinext Cloud responsabilise les entreprises dans l'implémentation et le fonctionnement sans faille des systèmes informatiques dans le Cloud. Notre équipe de professionnels qualifiés met à profit des technologies de pointe pour fournir des services informatiques complets, de la conception et de l'organisation à la gestion et au soutien. Avec un écosystème intégré, nous répondons rapidement aux besoins changeants des clients, en maximisant les avantages des services Cloud. Pour notre structure organisationnelle en croissance rapide, nous recherchons actuellement un: La technologie vous inspire ? Êtes-vous passionné par la cybersécurité et la protection des réseaux? Puis venez construire avec nous, en soutenant notre forte croissance qualitative et quantitative. Le candidat idéal possède une solide expertise en matière de sécurité des TI, avec un accent particulier sur les technologies Fortinet, et est impatient de prendre en charge l'architecture de sécurité, la gouvernance et des initiatives d'amélioration continue. Le poste relèvera du chef des opérations de Tinext Cloud et sera basé à notre QG à Morbio Inferiore. Dans ce rôle, vous serez en charge des activités suivantes : - Vous prendrez en charge la conception, la mise en œuvre et la gestion de solutions de sécurité de réseau basées sur les technologies Fortinet. - Oui. Vous définirez, conserverez et améliorerez continuellement les politiques, les normes de configuration, les modèles et les SOP, en assurant l'alignement sur les pratiques exemplaires et les exigences de sécurité tant pour l'infrastructure interne que pour les clients. - Oui. Vous gérerez et optimiserez les composantes de l'écosystème de la sécurité, y compris FortiManager et FortiAnalyzer, en assurant une bonne configuration, une gestion centralisée et une gouvernance de log. - Oui. Vous superviserez les opérations de sécurité telles que l'inspection approfondie des paquets, l'atténuation de la vulnérabilité, les mises à jour du firmware et la mise en œuvre de fonctionnalités avancées (par exemple ZTNA, SOC-as-a-Service). Vous contribuerez à l'évolution des services de sécurité en testant et en introduisant de nouvelles fonctionnalités et solutions, renforçant ainsi la posture globale de sécurité. - Oui. Vous prendrez en charge et coordonnerz les activités liées au pare-feu pendant les phases de conception et de démarrage du projet, en soulageant l'équipe de livraison des opérations quotidiennes de sécurité et en leur permettant de se concentrer sur les systèmes et les environnements cloud. - Oui. Vous collaborerez avec les équipes internes (p. ex., les TAM, les ingénieurs système) et les intervenants externes, en assurant le respect des normes définies et en soutenant les mises en œuvre à grande échelle au besoin. - Oui. Vous gérerez et améliorerez les interfaces SOC, les rapports et les notifications de sécurité, ainsi que produire des rapports de sécurité orientés vers le client. - Vous contribuerez aux migrations de clients (par exemple, les transitions IPsec/mobile VPN) et vous assurerez des configurations cohérentes et sécurisées dans tous les environnements. - Oui. Vous collaborerez également avec des spécialistes du système sur des solutions de sécurité en point d'arrivée telles que FortiClient, FortiEDR et FortiAuthenticator. ## Identikit - Au moins 5 ans d'expérience professionnelle en ingénierie de réseau et de sécurité, avec un accent particulier sur la gestion des pare-feu et la sécurité du réseau. - Expérience solide avec les technologies Fortinet (FortiGate, FortiManager, FortiAnalyzer), y compris les environnements multi-clients. - Bonne connaissance des principes fondamentaux du réseau et des meilleures pratiques en matière de sécurité. - Expérience dans la définition et la gestion des politiques de pare-feu, des modèles et des normes de sécurité. - Bonne connaissance des systèmes d'exploitation Windows et Linux, en particulier en ce qui concerne les solutions de sécurité des terminaux. - L'expérience avec FortiWeb et les solutions écosystémiques plus larges Fortinet est considérée comme un plus fort. - Des certifications comme Fortinet NSE4 (ou plus, idéalement NSE7 – Pare-feu d'entreprise) sont hautement souhaitables. - L'état d'esprit analytique, la précision et une approche structurée pour résoudre les problèmes. - Passion de cybersécurité, d'amélioration continue et de technologies émergentes. - Un joueur d'équipe avec de solides compétences en communication et la capacité de collaborer dans des domaines techniques. - En italien et en anglais, l'allemand serait un plus. - Oui. Vous vivez en Suisse ou à proximité de la frontière italo-suisse, ou vous êtes prêt à déménager. ##
• Cosa offriamo - Trousse salariale compétitive - Chemin de carrière et opportunités de croissance dans le domaine de la sécurité - Conditions de travail hybrides (travail intelligent) - Environnement international et dynamique - Soutien à l'apprentissage continu et à la certification - 60% contribution de l'employeur sur le LPP - Remboursement du transport ou parking gratuit
